title: Poly Network - REKT
relevance_summary: Cross-chain exploit using incorrect function signature verification

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls EthCrossChainData contract with custom function signature
prevention.trigger: CALL EthCrossChainData -> verifyHeaderAndExecuteTx -> executeCrossChainTx with custom _method

red_flags: Cross-chain message execution without proper validation
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS EthCrossChainData WITH CUSTOM FUNCTION SIGNATURE
summary: The Poly Network hack involved exploiting a vulnerability in the EthCrossChainManager contract due to incorrect function signature verification, allowing the attacker to execute arbitrary functions on the EthCrossChainData contract. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for calls to EthCrossChainData with custom function signatures.
